title: GUM Crayola Twistables Kids Toothbrush with Fun Twisting Head, Soft Bristles, Ages 3+ (Pack of 4) -230TT
description:
Product Description
Getting your kids excited about their daily tooth brushing routine requires more than just an ordinary kids toothbrush. Give them the fun and functional GUM Crayola Twistables Toothbrush for kids. It’s one of the best toothbrushes to keep kids engaged with bright and colorful handles, as well as a twistable head that can be extended from the toothbrush handle with a twist of the bottom green knob. When not in use, kids can twist the toothbrush back and store upside down in the included toothbrush cap. The cap doubles as a stand to keep the brush from rolling off the bathroom sink. This toothbrush also comes with soft, antibacterial bristles to further inhibit germ growth. The toothpaste sweet spot is highlighted by the colored bristles in the center of the compact head to teach children how much toothpaste they should be using. If you want to equip your little ones with a kids' toothbrush that will get them enthusiastic about their twice-daily tooth brushing routine, the GUM Crayola Twistable Toothbrush is what you need.
Manufacturer Contact Information
1-888-777-3116
features: EXTENDABLE TOOTHBRUSH HEAD: Twist the green knob on the handle to extend the compact toothbrush head for a fun and functional cleaning experience

KIDS TOOTHBRUSH CAP & STAND: Convenient antibacterial cap and stand to keep the brush from rolling off the sink. When it’s time to travel, pop the cap on top to cover the brush – perfect for road trips, camping, and sleepovers
CLINICALLY PROVEN BRISTLES: GUM Dome Trim brushes feature a raised center bristle design that provides greater contact with the tooth surface, while also reaching under the gum line
TOOTHPASTE SWEET SPOT: The compact head features colored centered soft bristles that teach children where to place their toothpaste and how much paste is needed
THE GUM MISSION: We are committed to helping people of all ages have stronger, healthier teeth, and gums by providing high quality, innovative oral care products that promote optimal dental health

reviews.title: Meh its ok
reviews.text: Its just a cheap what you would get for free at the kids dentist office kind of brush. Its totally flat but thats not a huge deal for me. The brush twisting gets my kids more into brushing their teeth but when I am brushing, the brush itself doesn't lock into place as as you are going around in their mouth and moving your hand it twists and doesn't stay in place. So I am typically adjusting at least once mid brush. Usually my kiddos are good about brushing but they have their days so its those days its really an issue for me. For the price it isn't worth it for me.

reviews.title: Great product! Decent price!
reviews.text: (Picture only shows three but there were four) adorable colors and tons of fun for my four year old. I thought they twisted all the way down but actually the head stays out then u use the stand as a cover which is what I needed since hes always knocking stuff off the bathroom sink. Will recommend to friends and family, and buy again in the future, really great product!

title: RADIUS - Source Toothbrush, Replacement-Head Technology and a Handle Made from Repurposed Materials, Colors May Vary (Super Soft, 1 Count)
description: Thanks to replacement-head technology and a handle made from repurposed materials, the Source™ reduces waste by 93%. When you’re done with one of its patented, gum-stimulating heads you simply swap it for another. And the luxurious cleaning continues.
features: EARTH-FRIENDLY and EASY TO HANDLE: Thanks to replacement-head technology and a handle made from repurposed materials, the Source reduces waste by 93%. When you’re done with one of its patented, gum-stimulating heads you simply swap it for another.

REPLACEABLE HEADS WITH PREMIUM BRISTLES: The Source cuts back on plastic usage while simultaneously boasting a unique curved bristle-bed, ensuring our sumptuously soft bristles clean and massage the gum rather than aggravating them.
LONGER NECK FOR A BETTER REACH: The Source has an unbreakable slim neck that’s longer than your average toothbrush to provide maximum reach in tight spaces.

UPCYCLED NATURAL-FEEL HANDLE: The elegant, one-of-a-kind handle is composed of repurposed and recycled materials — like wood, paper and even recycled dollar bills — for a beautiful, natural look and feel.
REVERSIBLE HANDLE DESIGN: As user-friendly for lefties as it is for right-handed brushers, the ergonomic design helps reduce pressure on teeth and gums for optimal oral health.

title: Bitvae Smart S3 Sonic Electric Toothbrush for Adults, 180-Day Battery Life Rechargeable Electric Power Toothbrush with Pressure Sensor, Champagne Gold
features: 【Provides Diamond Cleaning】Bitvae Smart S3 Rechargeable sonic toothbrush features an industry-leading ultrasonic motor that generates 40,000RPM. It provides superior cleaning even in hard-to-reach areas of your mouth. If you are looking for a professional cleaning toothbrush, this is the one!

【Unique Bristle Design to Prevent Tooth Decay】The unique bristle design of the sonic cleaning brush sets it apart from others. Users can get a more thorough dental cleaning experience than with a standard toothbrush. Effectively reduces tartar buildup and helps prevent tooth decay or cavities.

【Personalize Your Brushing】Here are 5 modes & 3 intensities on our sonic toothbrush (9 adjustable intensities on the app) for various gum care needs. This IPX7 waterproof toothbrush has a built-in 2mins timer that pulses every 30secs to remind you to switch to the next quadrant of the mouth.

【180-Day Battery Life】Bitvae S3 long-lasting battery toothbrush for adults features a 4-hour quick-charge battery that lasts up to 180 days, making it perfect for travel and far outperforming other toothbrushes on the market. Say goodbye to the bulky charging base with our USB Type-C cable.

【Pressure sensor protects teeth and gums】 Brushing too hard can damage tooth enamel, increase sensitivity and lead to gum recession. Our electronic toothbrush with pressure indicator will light up RED to remind you to reduce the pressure to protect your teeth and gums.

【"iSpruz" Smart Oral Care App】This Smart Bluetooth Toothbrush is paired with the app to track and store data on brushing time, coverage, uniformity and excess pressure. You can also change various settings through the app (such as brushing modes, intensities, and brushing time).

【Toothbrush Holder & Travel Case Included】The travel-friendly electric toothbrush includes a travel case that allows users to take the toothbrush anywhere. It also includes a toothbrush/phone holder that helps keep your toothbrush clean at all times. Great all round gift for yourself or your family.
【Package Includes】1 Bitvae S3 Toothbrush Handle, 4 Toothbrush Heads, 4 Toothbrush Covers, 1 Travel Case, 1 Toothbrush/Phone Holder, 1 USB Cable (Adaptor not Included), and 1 User Manual.
【1 Year Warranty】If you have any question, please contact bitvae fast and friendly customer service team, we will do our best to sovle any problem.

reviews.title: This toothbrush is amazing!
reviews.text: I was surprised by how well this smart electric toothbrush works. The toothbrush connected via Bluetooth to the iSpruz app without any problems. This is a great tool to improve your brushing skills! My teeth feel amazing after each brush. Great affordable toothbrush. Comes with a nice travel case.

reviews.title: Impressive amount of features and app allows customization and guidance for optimal brushing
reviews.text:
I got this to replace an old electric toothbrush, and I'm blown away at how technology has transformed tooth brushing! There are so many customizable features with this toothbrush, and the app will tell you if you're applying too much pressure, missing areas, or not spending enough time brushing.

Here are some of the pleasant surprises:

> Comes with a really nice travel case
> includes a special super soft brush head for gum massage
> The app is AMAZING. It's quick and easy to download and has lots of information and options to adjust the toothbrush operation
> Instruction pamphlet is well written and covers everything you need to know

HIGHLY RECOMMENDED!

reviews.title: Good value for the money, wish it pulsated a little stronger. Terrible app.
reviews.text: For the money this might be the best budget friendly electric toothbrush on Amazon in my opinion. Stay away from the app. It is terribly designed and doesn't consistently sync. The pulses are stronger than others in the same price class, but it isn't quite strong enough to give my mouth a feeling in deep cleaning.

reviews.title: It's a good toothbrush
reviews.text: It's a good toothbrush. I like that it vibrates every 30 seconds to help you keep track of the time. The brush tips are not too stiff as to be uncomfortable but stiff enough to get the job done.

reviews.title: Surprisingly fantastic!
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:be0e9ab7d6ac2bbe6f1a5308058bc84a]] I have tried other electric toothbrushes but this one exceeded my expectations. My teeth felt clean and I love the built in timers. No more second guessing if you have brushed long enough with this one.

The toothbrush has a great battery life. It took several hours to fully charge but once the light indicator turned from red to green; I haven’t had to charge it again. I have brushed my teeth more than 6 times and the battery is still going strong.

Another great feature is the ability to choose cleaning speeds and (cleaning and whitening) modes with the push of a button. I really enjoyed the high frequency clean mode. When I use this toothbrush, my teeth and tongue feels amazing day and night.

And finally, I was delighted to get 5 refill brush tips. The brush tips have a small profile making it easier to brush my wisdom teeth and the bristles are gentle to my gums. This is a great toothbrush with so many features making it a good value for about $30.

reviews.title: Love this!
reviews.text:
I have no idea how they make a battery last so long! It’s a wonder for sure! I have not needed to charge this thing since I got it, and that was weeks ago.
I love all the color combos that goes with this. There’s black, pink, white… so you can actually blend it in with your bathroom decor.
I opted for the black because our new granite tops are very dark in color.
There are a bunch of attachments that I might never use, but appreciate!
And for this price?! This is an awesome price point. You can’t go wrong with this rechargeable tooth brush.

reviews.title: Great Value!
reviews.text: Fits my Oral B electric toothbrush. Bristle style is a little different than what I'm used to. But it cleans my teeth just as well as the name brand replacement toothbrush heads. Cant beat the price vs the comparable name brand.

reviews.title: Works fine. Medium soft.
reviews.text:
These are perfectly good replacement toothbrush heads.
They're what I would call a medium-soft bristle, which is about as soft as I like.

Minor points:
Many replacements now come with plastic hoods that snap on to protect the brush from airborne contaminates. These don't.

OEM brushes let you swap the little colored rings on the base, so you can always keep your favorite color. These don't. They have different colors, but they can't be changed.

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text:
Replacement brush heads can be so expensive. That's why I love finding value replacements online.
Nice price for the 4 brush heads. These are good for one person for a year at least.
Brushes are soft so no damaging my gums or teeth.
Works perfect with my oral b.

reviews.title: Fits my electric toothbrush
reviews.text: Just like the original except the price.With the originals price keep going up, this is a very good alternative. shipping was quick.

reviews.title: Fits perfect, soft feeling, strong
reviews.text:
I've been using OralB floss action toothbrush heads for a long time.

While these aren't floss action they clean my teeth nicely.

They fit the OralB toothbrush perfectly, actually felt a little click when I connected it.

The bristles are softer than the brush heads I've been using.

After almost a week of use they seem to be holding up well and feel very strong while using them.

At a little over $2 per head they are a pretty good deal.

title: Curaprox Soft Toothbrush CS 1560, 6 Pack, Colors May Vary
description: The CS 1560 Soft Toothbrush gently fights plaque and stains with the power of CUREN filaments. With densely packed and incredibly gentle bristles, the CS 1560 provides a deeper clean without damaging your gums. Tough on plaque and delicate on gums, the CS 1560 is designed for optimum oral health. The octagonal handle of the CS 1560 delivers precise manipulation to brush at every angle, with an angled brush head removes stubborn plaque and stains in hard-to-reach places. Enamel erosion and receding gum lines can be caused by vigorous scrubbing and hard brushes. To prevent this kind of damage, switch to a softer bristle like the CS 1560. CUREN bristles are gentler than typical nylon brushes for a healthier smile.
features: BRIGHTER SMILE: Transition to a softer brush and deeper clean with the CS 1560, equipped with 1,560 tightly packed 0.15 mm bristles to fight plaque and stay gentle on enamel and gums.
SOFT BRISTLES: By using CUREN filaments instead of nylon, Curaprox toothbrush bristles are incredibly fine and gentle to prevent enamel erosion.
GENTLE ON GUMS: Harsh brushing and stiff bristles can irritate your gum line. The CS 1560 cleans gently to promote gum and oral health.
ANGLED BRUSH: The angled head allows you to remove stubborn plaque and stains in hard to reach places.
STOCK UP: Available in a pack of 6 to stay stocked up year round for a healthier smile.

reviews.title: Pretty good from someone that is a bit of a skeptic on the benefits of sonic toothbrushes
reviews.text:
Review for: Sparx - Electric Toothbrush, Ultrasonic Toothbrush, Cordless Toothbrush Rechargeable with Light Therapy Technology,

Having tried a couple of different sonic toothbrushes, I have not been impressed with them when compared to a true electric toothbrush. This one though, is much closer to making me a convert. It has much more vibration than others that I have tried and it does feel like it is doing more to clean my teeth. I am not sure if the blue light is really making my teeth whiter but if it is, that is a huge plus.

The brush comes with an extra head, a charger and a set of instructions.

reviews.title: Love this
reviews.text: I’ve been using this all week and really like it. I haven’t had to recharge it. It says it stays charged for 15 hours. I love the 3 different settings (clean, whiten, polish)! My teeth feel cleaner and smoother. It’s a great product!! Highly recommend!

reviews.title: my teeth feels very clean after 1 week of use
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:d99e4c11dd05411b9b597ceb102b22f]] Update: For some reason mine stopped turning on even after I fully charged it. However, customer service was excellent! I reached out to them on Amazon and they immediately sent me a replacement which arrived in 2 days. I am very happy with their level of customer service, in addition to this still being one of the best electronic toothbrush I've used. It really just makes my mouth feel so clean, more than the Philips one ever did. The replacement set that I received has one toothbrush head that emits blue light, and one that emits red light. In my previous set there were only blue light heads so I'm happy I finally get to try the red light. I am currently using this with a whitening gel paste from another brand and it works wonderfully. I am waiting for Sparx to come out with toothpaste (fluoride free please!) and whitening paste. Bottom line: great customer service, great product, and still highly recommend Sparx!

I really like this toothbrush and it really makes me want to brush my teeth more frequently. I have to admit I sometimes get lazy to brush my teeth but this one makes me look forward to my night time routine. I already have an electric toothbrush at home but this one caught my eye because of the LED blue light. I just had to get it because I was curious about this feature.

In terms of the brush power, I think it is great. There are different modes - clean, white, polish, and gum care. Each one vibrates in a different manner. I like that the button is big because if I want to change modes mid brush, my thumb can find it easily. I've used other electric toothbrushes where the power button is so small I couldn't really find it with my thumb. The overall design and size of the button, toothbrush head, and body is perfect, at least for me.

This does use a proprietary brush head, which currently comes in a 1 or 2 pack. It is cheaper to get the 2 pack. I am currently using the blue light version. I believe if you want the red light you'll have to purchase a different brush head. The set I got is both blue light brush heads, so there were two replaceable brush heads in the box. I believe some of their other sets comes with one blue and one red. There is a small charging stand which will need to be plugged into an outlet for the toothbrush to charge.

My only confusion with this product is how the blue light works. Will it work with my own toothpaste or does it require Sparx branded toothpaste? Does the light works to whiten teeth regardless if you use toothpaste or not? Is the LED blue light safe to use on skin? That is the only part that I needed more clarification on, and wished there was more information on this Amazon page.

Regardless of my questions, I still think this is a great electric toothbrush with a lot of potential. My teeth feels so clean after use.

reviews.title: Good Sonic Toothbrush, Confusing Instructions on Whitening
reviews.text: This is an expensive sonic toothbrush that has a blue light feature.  As a sonic toothbrush it works well but there are other options out there that are less expensive that don't require specialized replacement heads.  It is nice that this charges using an USB interface so that saves on cords when traveling.  It is generally not clear how the blue light is supposed to help.  Looking up teeth whitening technology it appears you need a special gel for the blue light to activate teeth whitening.  This is not included with the toothbrush nor discussed in the literature that I can find.  Overall, this works well as a sonic toothbrush, but you will need to purchase special teeth whitening gel to gain the benefits of the blue light as I don't really see a difference by itself.

reviews.title: Best toothbrush
reviews.text: This is my second cybersonic toothbrush.  When my first cybersonic failed after many years of good service I ordered a less expensive name brand electric toothbrush and after 6 weeks threw it away and ordered my new cybersonic. Lesson learned.

reviews.title: Great product
reviews.text:
I've been using Cybersonic for decades. My teeth don't feel clean without it.
My second handle/rechargable battery needed replacing, so I decided to try the Cybersonic 3. I was surprised how much lighter it feels. And I think the oscillation is faster, but I didn't read up on it to check. Same great result - really clean teeth. The timing indicator isn't something I wanted/needed, but doesn't bother me. I has basically ignore it. Hope this handle lasts as long as my previous ones.
I really like the charging base. I discarded the side attachments to hold extra brushes and accessories, which left me with a sleek, minimalistic charging base.
So far I'm really happy with my purchase & highly recommend this product/brand/company.

How it works for you is just going to depend on whether you like that. You can get a lot more at the same time, but some people may find it uncomfortable, especially if you have a small mouth. But it is a way to be very efficient and get a lot of areas. It feels well made. It seems like a quality brush.

reviews.title: Nothing fancy but does the job.
reviews.text: Toothbrushes are necessary and seem to be the one thing that I forget to purchase when I go to the store. So, ordering these Ooak toothbrushes was a no-brainer. These are not fancy. They are traditional toothbrushes that leave your teeth feeling smooth and clean (grit free). There are five rows of soft bristles…the three rows in the center are straight and the outside (colored) ones are slightly angled. The colors of the brushes are neutral, white and orange. The rubber grip handle makes it easy to grip and hold. And finally, on Amazon this two pack is under $7, which is reasonable when compared to other two packs on the market. I’d recommend these.

reviews.title: A unique set of toothbrushes
reviews.text: This toothbrush set has been designed in a V design for the bristles - which means that it looks different than other toothbrushes. The bristles have a lot of space to get in the gum line, in between teeth and works well. I got the medium bristles which are fine with me. I don't want too hard of a bristle, as that is not recommended by the dentist. This does a decent job cleaning.

reviews.text: I've been trying to give this toothbrush the benefit of the doubt, but I give up. I charge it, and for 15 seconds it runs full strength, then slowly declines like my older brush was doing, not holding a charge. Not sure when this was manufactured, or how old the battery is, but it's not holding a charge. It will not run for 365 days on one charge, that's for sure. I will have to return.

reviews.title: Worth every cent
reviews.text: Works wonderfully . Especially for the price

reviews.title: 8 Heads more important than you might think
reviews.text:
I've been trying a bunch of similar toothbrushes lately. First off, most of the brands do not have interchangeable heads, so many of these will end up getting thrown out once the heads are used. For that reason, getting 8 heads with this is an important feature, because at least for the current price, you could hardly buy 8 disposable brushes.

One of the things I like about some others is when they have an induction charger that also acts like a little dock (of those, I prefer the ones with a USB plug rather than an AC plug). Those normally charge a premium, but this one is inexpensive, so at least they have that going for it. It's not like you have to charge it often (although definitely more than once a year), but laying a toothbrush down to plug it in is cumbersome, and it takes a while to charge.

I don't want or need the 30/120 second timers, but every single one I've ever seen (of the "sonic" type) has had that, so how can I complain? I end up brushing for 6-10 minutes most of the time.

Not a bad version of the less expensive off-brand options, but I don't think anyone can predict the future as to if and for how long replacement heads will be available.

reviews.title: Great Electric Toothbrush
reviews.text: Solid and strong vibration and easy to use sonic electric toothbrush. I got this for my husband and so far he is happy with this sonic electric toothbrush. THANKS
